title: Savory American Casserole
description: A classic comfort food casserole with a crispy top and a warm, cheesy center. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the Savory Casserole Mix and shredded cheese.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk and egg.
Add the milk mixture to the Savory Casserole Mix and stir until combined.
Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the sliced sharp cheddar and American cheese on top.
Bake for 30-35 minutes or until the casserole is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
